title: Cpk to PPM Converter
description: Converts Process Capability Index (Cpk) to Parts Per Million (PPM) defect rate and provides actionable insights for process improvement. Based on Six Sigma and ISO 22514 standards.

inputs.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
inputs.businessContext: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical targets: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical targets: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cpk, bir prosesin spesifikasyon limitlerini ne kadar iyi karşıladığını ve merkezlemeyi hesaba katan standart bir Altı Sigma metriğidir. Tipik hedefler: 1,33 (minimum kabul edilebilir), 1,67 (iyi), 2,0 (mükemmel).
businessContext_i18n.de: Cpk ist eine standardmäßige Six-Sigma-Kennzahl, die angibt, wie gut ein Prozess die Spezifikationsgrenzen einhält, unter Berücksichtigung der Zentrierung. Typische Zielwerte: 1,33 (minimal akzeptabel), 1,67 (gut), 2,0 (ausgezeichnet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le Cpk est une métrique standard Six Sigma indiquant dans quelle mesure un procédé respecte les limites de spécification, en tenant compte du centrage. Cibles typiques : 1,33 (minimum acceptable), 1,67 (bon), 2,0 (excellent).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cpk es una métrica estándar de Seis Sigma que indica qué tan bien un proceso cumple con los límites de especificación, considerando el centrado. Objetivos típicos: 1.33 (mínimo aceptable), 1.67 (bueno), 2.0 (excelente).

inputs.label: Sigma Shift (long-term drift)
inputs.businessContext: Accounts for long-term process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

businessContext_i18n.en: Accounts for long-term process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uzun vadeli proses kaymasını hesaba katar. Standart Altı Sigma varsayımı 1,5 sigma kaymasıdır. Geçmiş verilere veya endüstri normlarına (örneğin otomotiv genellikle 1,5 kullanır) göre ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Berücksichtigt langfristige Prozessdrift. Standardannahme bei Six Sigma ist eine 1,5-Sigma-Verschiebung. Anpassung basierend auf historischen Daten oder Branchenstandards (z. B. Automobilindustrie verwendet oft 1,5).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tient compte de la dérive à long terme du procédé. L'hypothèse standard Six Sigma est un décalage de 1,5 sigma. Ajustez en fonction des données historiques ou des normes sectorielles (par exemple, l'automobile utilise souvent 1,5).
businessContext_i18n.es: Considera la deriva del proceso a largo plazo. La suposición estándar de Seis Sigma es un desplazamiento de 1.5 sigma. Ajuste según datos históricos o normas de la industria (por ejemplo, automotriz a menudo usa 1.5).

inputs.label: Distribution Type
inputs.businessContext: Select distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklem büyüklüğü ve veri özelliklerine göre dağılım seçin. Büyük örneklemler (n>30) için Normal, küçük örneklemler (n<30) için belirsizliği hesaba katmak üzere t-dağılımı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Verteilung basierend auf Stichprobengröße und Datencharakteristik. Normalverteilung für große Stichproben (n>30), t-Verteilung für kleine Stichproben (n<30) zur Berücksichtigung der Unsicherheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez la distribution en fonction de la taille de l'échantillon et des caractéristiques des données. Normale pour les grands échantillons (n>30), distribution t pour les petits échantillons (n<30) pour tenir compte de l'incertitude.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione la distribución según el tamaño de la muestra y las características de los datos. Normal para muestras grandes (n>30), distribución t para muestras pequeñas (n<30) para considerar la incertidumbre.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations used to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations used to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cpk tahmini için kullanılan gözlem sayısı. Daha büyük örneklemler güveni artırır. t-dağılımı ayarlaması için gereklidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen zur Schätzung von Cpk. Größere Stichproben verbessern die Genauigkeit. Erforderlich für die t-Verteilungsanpassung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'observations utilisées pour estimer le Cpk. Des échantillons plus grands améliorent la confiance. Requis pour l'ajustement par la distribution t.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones utilizadas para estimar Cpk. Muestras más grandes mejoran la confianza. Requerido para el ajuste de distribución t.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level for the confidence interval of the PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Confidence level for the confidence interval of the PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: PPM tahmininin güven aralığı için güven düzeyi. Daha yüksek düzeyler daha muhafazakar (daha geniş) aralıklar sağlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Konfidenzniveau für das Konfidenzintervall der PPM-Schätzung. Höhere Werte liefern konservativere (breitere) Intervalle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance pour l'intervalle de confiance de l'estimation PPM. Des niveaux plus élevés fournissent des intervalles plus conservateurs (plus larges).
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de confianza para el intervalo de confianza de la estimación de PPM. Niveles más altos proporcionan intervalos más conservadores (más amplios).

inputs.label: Use Confidence Interval
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and upper bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and upper bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinleştirilirse, araç güven düzeyine göre PPM için alt ve üst sınırları hesaplar. Risk değerlendirmesi için kullanışlıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, berechnet das Tool untere und obere Grenzen für PPM basierend auf dem Konfidenzniveau. Nützlich für die Risikobewertung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si activé, l'outil calcule les limites inférieure et supérieure du PPM en fonction du niveau de confiance. Utile pour l'évaluation des risques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si está habilitado, la herramienta calcula límites inferior y superior para PPM basados en el nivel de confianza. Útil para la evaluación de riesgos.

rules.message: Cpk values above 3.0 are extremely rare; please verify input.
Sigma shift must be between 0 and 2.0.
Sample size must be at least 2 for t-distribution.
Confidence level must be between 90% and 99% when using confidence interval.

thresholds.message: Cpk below 1.33 indicates process is not capable. Immediate improvement required.
Cpk between 1.33 and 1.67 is acceptable but consider improvement for higher sigma levels.
PPM exceeds 1000; process is producing excessive defects.
PPM between 100 and 1000; monitor process closely.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
